notes: Install dotnet20 with Winetricks (I also specified a 64-bit Winearch), then select Configure before your first play. Afterwards I could launch with no issue.
title: Sonic the Hedgehog 4 - Episode II

notes: As someone else stated, this game requires dotnet20 to run and esync to be disabled. On Ubuntu 19.04, I achieved this with by running WINEPREFIX="$HOME/.steam/debian-installation/steamapps/compatdata/203650/pfx" WINEARCH=win64 winetricks dotnet20 -- you may need to adjust this for your distro. The game and config tool run perfectly from Steam after you do this and disable esync.
title: Sonic the Hedgehog 4 - Episode II

notes: Disabling Esync & running 'WINEPREFIX="$HOME/.steam/debian-installation/steamapps/compatdata/203650/pfx" WINEARCH=win64 winetricks dotnet20' by the terminal made the game & its config launcher run perfectly on Pop!_OS 19.04. Well, almost. I have a high-refresh (100 Hz) rate monitor, & unlike on Windows where the game knows to limit itself to 60 FPS, for some reason under Proton it tried 100 FPS & went too . . . fast. This can be fixed by manually changing your desktop refresh rate to 60 Hz or thereabouts.
title: Sonic the Hedgehog 4 - Episode II
